community.title: Loyalty Challenge (AEP) - Team presentation
community.evidence: Presented new upcoming AEP product Loyalty Challenge to Expert SC team on Expert SC Team Call; demonstrates thought leadership and promoting own product area.
community.impact: Team awareness of new AEP capability; supports Practice Lead bar for regularly speaking and presenting to promote product area.

community.title: Riyadh AI Forum
community.evidence: Delivered a 30-minute presentation on stage at Riyadh AI Forum to close to 100 Middle East customers; demonstrates external presence and promoting product/team to a broad audience.
community.impact: Reached ~100 customers in region; supports Practice Lead bar for regularly speaking at events to promote product area and team work.
